name: rocket, antipersonnel
description: A large anti-personnel rocket for a military rocket launcher.  Designed to be highly effective against personnel.

name: rocket, antipersonnel
description: A High Explosive Dual Purpose anti-materiel rocket for a military rocket launcher.  Designed to be highly effective against vehicles and structures.

name: 84x246mm smoke rocket
description: A 84x246mm smoke marker rrocket for a military rocket launcher.  Commonly used for signaling, target designation, and for screening troop movements.
